title: apphhzpLIB
description:
A library created by apphhzp.
apphhzp制作的个人自用库。
body:
<details>
<summary>English</summary>
  
**Warning: Do not add `+` or `!` characters to the file name of this mod! Otherwise, the game will crash!**

A library created by apphhzp.
Includes functions such as obtaining Java private fields, modifying **local** Hotspot JVM memory data, etc.

Some features are only supported on Windows.

The DLL files in this mod are only used for calling JVMTI and **locally** injecting JavaAgent, and do not contain any virus programs.

</details>

<details>
<summary>中文</summary>
  
**警告：不要在此mod的文件名中添加`+`或`!`字符！否则游戏会崩溃！**

apphhzp的个人自用库。
包含获取Java私有变量、修改**本地**HotspotJVM内存数据等功能。

部分功能仅支持Windows系统。

这个mod里的dll文件仅用于调用JVMTI和**本地**注入JavaAgent，不含任何病毒程序。

</details>
